EventLog.title: Event Log
EventLog.description: A log of a security event detected by the camera AI.

timestamp.description: The time the event was detected.

description.description: A brief description of the event.

severity.description: The severity level of the event.

location.description: The specific area where the event occurred.

aiAnalysis.description: Detailed analysis of the clip content generated by AI.

WeirdnessConfig.title: Weirdness Configuration
WeirdnessConfig.description: Configurable parameters for the weirdness detection algorithm.

motionThreshold.description: The threshold for motion detection (0.0 to 1.0).

lingeringThreshold.description: The threshold for lingering detection (in seconds).

emailTo.description: The email address to send alerts to.

smtpServer.description: The SMTP server to use for sending emails.

rtspUrl.description: The RTSP URL of the camera stream.

rtspUsername.description: The username for the RTSP stream.

rtspPassword.description: The password for the RTSP stream.

SecurityReport.title: Security Report
SecurityReport.description: A generated summary of security events over a period.

period.description: The time period covered by the report.

eventCount.description: Total number of events in this period.

status.description: The current status of the report.

Tenant.title: Tenant
Tenant.description: Information about a tenant in the building.

/event_logs/{logId}.description: Collection of all security event logs.

/config/weirdness.description: Global configuration for the weirdness detection algorithm.
